title: TRADER REVIEW: The " ONE CANDLE " Scalping Strategy I Will Use For Life @The Rumers
thesis_bullets: This trader here says that one single indicator is enough to become a profitable trader and that indicator is the nine exponential moving average.
And listen, I suggest you stay until the end because yes, this strategy looks a little bit too simple to be profitable, but when backtesting, the data did something that I just didn't expect.
Okay, guys, here we are on YouTube.
This is the YouTube channel I was talking about.
I've been through this strategy and pretty anything seems very, very simple.
This paid trader has been pitching they has 26 years of trading experience behind him.
And in this words, you just simply don't need any more indicators.
And that is the exponential moving average, also known as the EMA at a length of nine.
And even better, he claims that with this indicator, you can get sniper entries, which is a pretty cool story.
So I guess now it's time for us to test it.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
